name: FirstClass Failed Login Attempt
description: Detects failed login attempts to a FirstClass system, which may indicate brute-force attacks or credential stuffing.

prompts.prompt: A failed login attempt to a FirstClass system was detected. This could indicate a brute-force or credential stuffing attack. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **User Name** {user_name}, **Source IP** {source_ip}, **Application** {application}. Investigate this activity to determine if it's a legitimate user error or a malicious attempt to gain unauthorized access.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the failed login attempt.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The username that failed to log in.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The IP address from which the login attempt originated.

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: The application or interface used for the login attempt (e.g., 'FirstClass client', 'web interface').
